problem id: 5bd26372
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11010100 -> 10010101
  00001011 -> 01011010
  01110000 -> 10011100
  10110001 -> 10100100
  11100100 -> 00011001
  10000101 -> 00001001
  11011011 -> 11101110
  01011111 -> 11101111

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 00101000
